pr_body: Adds get_account using an asyncpg positional-placeholder parameterized query.
author: contributor

files.patch:
@@ -1 +1,5 @@
 import asyncpg
+
+
+async def get_account(conn, owner):
+    return await conn.fetch("SELECT * FROM accounts WHERE owner = $1", owner)
